item.title:
WeAreWST: WST @WeAreWST · 4min Morning, Ken!
The ‘97 World Champ joins David Hendon, Steven Hallworth and Rob Walker in our mult
item.description:
WST @WeAreWST · 4min Morning, Ken!
The ‘97 World Champ joins David Hendon, Steven Hallworth and Rob Walker in our multi-table Judgement Day coverage!
Watch LIVE from 10:50AM BST.
#WorldChampionship 1 6 335

item.title: PDCEurope: PDC Darts Europe @PDCEurope · 17min With his victory yesterday at the Players Championship in Wigan, Chris Dobey has cla
item.description: PDC Darts Europe @PDCEurope · 17min With his victory yesterday at the Players Championship in Wigan, Chris Dobey has claimed the 10th Pro Tour title of his career! 1 97

item.title:
WeAreWST: WST @WeAreWST · 23min JUDGEMENT DAY IS HERE!
Watch DAY ONE live from 10:50AM to find out who will be joining the Top 1
item.description:
WST @WeAreWST · 23min JUDGEMENT DAY IS HERE!
Watch DAY ONE live from 10:50AM to find out who will be joining the Top 16 at the Crucible!
Watch LIVE AND FREE on WST Play & for FREE with ads on YouTube.
#WorldChampionship 2 9 1 mil
